# Modflow

**Summary**: A standard finite-difference groundwater flow model used to simulate groundwater movement in porous media.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-ahmad|Ahmad, 2024]] used MODFLOW to calculate groundwater flow and provide input for solute transport modeling.
